entries.drift_reason: Multiple LLM providers announced significant pricing changes since last PESTLE analysis. Competitive landscape in AI agent tooling shifted materially.
Competitor X launched AI-powered PRD generation. Competitor Y announced agent-based workflow automation. Both changes significantly alter competitive positioning.
AI agent tooling market has grown approximately 3x faster than originally projected. TAM estimates from 2025 are likely 40-60% below current reality.

alerts.message: Competitor dossier is 77 days old (17 days past TTL). Two major competitors have shipped significant features since last update. Downstream battle cards and competitive matrix may be incorrect.
alerts.recommended_action: Run competitive radar scan immediately. Refresh competitor_dossier and all downstream battle cards. Re-evaluate market strategy positioning.

alerts.message: Market sizing brief from December 2025 is stale. AI agent tooling market has grown faster than projections. TAM/SAM/SOM likely outdated. Investor content references stale numbers.
alerts.recommended_action: Refresh market sizing with 2026 data. Update TAM/SAM/SOM projections. Revalidate investor memo numbers.

alerts.message: PESTLE analysis approaching staleness (42 of 90 days). Drift detected due to pricing changes and competitive shifts in LLM provider landscape. Economic factors may have shifted.
alerts.recommended_action: Schedule PESTLE refresh within 30 days. Prioritize Economic and Technological factors given LLM pricing shifts.

refresh_recommendations.reason: Critical stale. Two competitor launches detected. Battle cards and competitive matrix outdated.
refresh_recommendations.estimated_impact: Battle cards used by sales team contain incorrect competitive claims. Market strategy brief may reference outdated competitive landscape.
refresh_recommendations.trigger_condition: Competitive radar detected feature launches from 2 major competitors within 30 days

refresh_recommendations.reason: Stale. Market growth rate exceeded projections. Investor content references stale numbers.
refresh_recommendations.estimated_impact: Investor communications may understate market opportunity. Strategy options may underweight growth scenarios.
refresh_recommendations.trigger_condition: Market growth rate 3x above original projections
